items.heading: Your always-on IT department
items.body: We monitor, maintain, and manage your entire environment around the clock — catching and resolving issues before they ever reach your team. Predictable flat-rate billing means no surprise invoices when things break.

items.heading: Secure cloud, without the headaches
items.body: Migrate, host, and scale your workloads in the cloud with security and compliance baked in. Give a distributed workforce safe access to the apps and data they need from anywhere.
features: Virtual desktops for secure remote access

items.heading: Defense in depth, tuned to your risk
items.body: Layered protection across your network, endpoints, and users — sized to your budget and threat profile. We deploy, monitor, and continuously tune your defenses so attackers never find an open door.

items.heading: Back to business in minutes, not days
items.body: Automated, encrypted, offsite backups paired with regularly tested recovery plans. When ransomware, hardware failure, or human error strikes, you restore fast — with your compliance obligations intact.

items.heading: Fast help, wherever your team works
items.body: On-site, hybrid, or fully remote — your people get quick, friendly resolution from a US-based help desk that already knows your environment. Most tickets are solved on first contact in under 15 minutes.

items.heading: Pass the audit. Prove it.
items.body: HIPAA, SOC 2, and PCI readiness with the documentation, controls, and training regulators expect. We run the risk assessments, write the policies, and give you the evidence to sail through audits.

items.heading: Modern phones your team actually likes
items.body: Cloud-based business phone systems with the features a professional office needs — and mobile apps so your team is reachable on any device without giving out personal numbers.
